extra.reason: WS1 hybrid access/policy core complete: 10/10 TDD tasks. Label lattice + rules + clearances + Accessor rewrite + Object::Policy + AclBackend shims + PolicyHook/registry + repo integration + ApprovalHook. All 247 prior tests preserved; full suite 191 lib + integration green. Commits 4576e7f..e8af940.

WS2 workspace unification complete. Workspace trait (async_trait) + EphemeralWorkspace impl (additive) + DiskWorkspace (filesystem-backed, single disk-walk excluding .bole/symlinks, write-through, lazy). CLI snapshot create / workspace diff / workspace show retrofitted onto DiskWorkspace; duplicate collect_blobs removed. Also fixed WS1 fallout (Object::Policy CLI match). Full workspace green: lib 197 + cli 38. Decisions doc: plans/2026-07-01-ws2-decisions.md. Commits 18f49fb..92fa0c3.

WS3 secrets/env complete (scope: core + env resolve/run + rekey; KMS deferred to bole-vw9). KeyProvider/ProviderChain, SecretV2 envelope (postcard deviation: new Object::SecretV2 not untagged enum), resolve_overlay (WS1-gated fail-closed), rekey (rewrap v2 / upgrade v1, auto-repoint registry+overlays), secret ACLs (Memory; Disk parity=bole-6l2), CLI env resolve/run + secret rekey. Full workspace green: 21 test binaries, exit 0. Decisions: plans/2026-07-01-ws3-decisions.md. Commits 504cdf6..049c402.

WS4 storage-at-scale complete (scope: pack format + PackedDiskBackend + repack + mark-sweep GC + count/compact; atomic ref transactions deferred to bole-sk6). Pack .pack/.idx self-verifying (WS5 wire payload), loose-first packed backend, crash-safe repack, GC from ref roots + extra_roots (registry-safe) with grace window, bole store repack/gc CLI. Full workspace green: 21 test binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. Decisions: plans/2026-07-01-ws4-decisions.md. Commits 4a15426..cd0de39.

Atomic multi-ref transactions complete. RefTransaction builder (create_tag/move_tag/create_timeline/advance_head/delete_ref + expect/advance_head_if CAS), all-or-nothing commit via absolute-value plan, journal-over-per-file on disk (fsync commit point + idempotent replay on open), Error::TransactionConflict. Full workspace green: 21 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. Unblocks WS5 CAS-on-heads. Commits 43500d5.

WS5 core sync engine complete (scope: in-process fetch/push/clone + CAS; wire codec/Transport/HTTP=bole-6qy, policy verification=bole-0tp, authn=bole-6h7 deferred). Negotiated missing-closure transfer via self-verifying WS4 packs, remote-tracking refs, git-model CAS push (expected_old=tracking ref) FF/policy gated, clone. Full workspace green: 22 test binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. Decisions: plans/2026-07-01-ws5-decisions.md. Commits 0d27e62.

WS6 git import/round-trip complete (scope: full library; CLI verb=bole-58u). git_import via gix (branches/tags/commit-closure -> timelines/tags/snapshots, committer+tagger trailers, symlink=blob, submodule skip, ref sanitize), IdentityMap sidecar for incremental re-import (policy-gated advance + force), --label-ruleset applies WS1 PathAcls; project_to_git_mapped persists snapshot<->commit map + annotated git tag export. Full workspace green: 21 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. 10 git_import tests incl round-trip + incremental + label + annotated-tag. Decisions: plans/2026-07-01-ws6-decisions.md. Commits f890f86.

WS7 complete (scope: Part A hardening full + targeted README repositioning; full doc rewrite=bole-9c0). Staleness classifier + workspace prune/repair(R1/R2/R3)/list --check with git-like exit codes; 8 integration tests. README leads with access-control differentiator + honest Status/roadmap table (WS1-6 realized). Full workspace green: 22 test binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. Decisions: plans/2026-07-01-ws7-decisions.md (NOTE: not written - decisions inline in commits). Commits e6ed0f2, 3c068a1.

Sync wire codec + Transport/Conn trait + InProcessConn + SyncSession state machine (serve/client_fetch/client_push) complete. Protocol driven over any Conn, reusing WS4 packs + RefTransaction CAS + WS1 authz. Full workspace green: 22 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. 5 new tests (3 wire, 2 session over InProcess). No new deps. Concrete TCP/HTTP/SSH transports = bole-vih. Commits f746431.

WS7 Part B doc repositioning complete. CLI.md (expanded mental model + linked-worktree hardening section), API.md (Core-concepts framing + Access model subsection), bole-cli/README (repositioned opening + Worktree row), skills claude-code/hermes/codex (new description + access-inside-repo addendum + --as/prune-repair critical facts; two SKILL.md kept identical). Policy authority complete (WS5 5). Ed25519 detached signatures (ed25519-dalek), TrustStore/TrustAnchor, PolicySigner (seed/KMS-swappable), verify_chain (fail-closed: present + lattice/rules present + hooks resolvable + direct-anchor signed), reconcile (highest-rooted-wins / Diverged). Full workspace green: 22 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. 3 tests (sign+verify, unsigned/untrusted/bad-hook reject, longer-chain-wins/divergent). Unblocks bole-fz1. Commit 6b88795.

Concrete network transports: TCP (TcpConn reuses SyncSession over a framed socket + serve_tcp_once) and minimal HTTP/1.1 (POST /bole/v1/{fetch,push}, single request per verb, no framework). Real over-the-socket fetch/push, loopback tests for both. Full workspace green: 22 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. Added tokio net feature. SSH + TLS/proxy-grade HTTP deferred. Commits 1e8a4d6, 961eb60.

Sync authn/authz complete (WS5 6). ActorMap (principal->actor) + accessor_for building the WS1 Accessor from the mapped actor's ClearanceGrant (anonymous->empty/public-read-no-write); no second authz model. RefSigner/verify_ref_op ed25519 signed-ref helpers. MemoryAclBackend grant storage + AclStore::set_grant. End-to-end: principal->accessor->authorized push over a session, anonymous denied. Full workspace green: 22 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. 3 tests. Commit 5daafc5.

Signed approval attestations complete. Attestation (ed25519 over target+head), ApproverRegistry, AttestationSigner, verify_attestation, count_valid_approvals (distinct registered approvers, exact head), SignedApprovalHook. Placeholder approval refs marked superseded (kept for HookSpec 'approval' kind). Full workspace green: 22 binaries, exit 0, clippy clean. 2 tests. Commit 05e2e10.
bole git import CLI verb complete (wraps git_import: --branch/--timeline-policy/--label-ruleset/--dry-run/--force). Round-trip CLI test. Full workspace green: 23 binaries, clippy clean. Commit.

DiskAclBackend secret-ACL persistence complete (acls/secrets/ postcard files, set/delete/list overrides, projects into ruleset). Persist-across-reopen test. Full workspace green: 23 binaries, clippy clean. Commit.

KMS slot complete (feature kms): KmsClient trait + KmsKeyProvider (delegates DK wrap/unwrap) + LocalKmsClient reference adapter. Envelope round-trip + wrong-key tests.
